name: platform-team-adoptions
description: Eight cross-tenant adoption events: each consumer tenant declares its dependency on a curated mix of Salt components. The provider is implicit — when `provider_tenant` is omitted the loader resolves it to the orchestrator's default tenant, so this bundle is slug-agnostic and runs against whichever platform tenant `make dev-seed` was invoked against.

adoptions.intent: Primary CTA buttons across the trading dashboard.
Order-book + positions tables; needs the 100k-row virtualization in v1.45.
Symbol-search inputs in the trade entry panel.
Wraps every input on the model-config forms with label + validation.
Free-text fields in the model-config forms.
Feature-flag toggles on the experiment pages.
Step-card surfaces for the onboarding wizard.
The headline component — the onboarding flow IS a Stepper.
